keynotes.text: A SYNOPTIC KEY OF THE MATERIA MEDICA By Cyrus Maxwell BOGER Presented by Médi-T REPERTORY DORSAL REGION. Dorsal region : Arn., Ars., Bell., Calc-c., Caust., Chin., Cocc., Gels., Ign., Lyc., Nat-m., Nux-v., Pho., Pic-ac., Pul., Rhus-t., Rut., Sep., Sil., Sul. Dorsal region, curvature : Aur., Calc-c., Lyc., Merc., Pul., Sul. Dorsal region, emaciated : Nux-v. Dorsal region, sensitive , spine : Agar., Bell., Chin-s., Cimi., Hyper., Ign., Nux-v., Pho., Zin. Dorsal region, stiff : Caust., Rhus-t. Dorsal region, weak : Pic-ac. Dorsal region, weak, interscapular : Agar., Alu., Bur-p., Radm-b., Sars. Copyright © Médi-T 1999
